title: Ropedia Xperience-10M Research Roadmap
summary: Staged path from the public-sample task lab to multi-episode held-out evaluation, foundation-model selection, and larger omni/world-model extensions.
current_decision_point: Keep the public-sample task suite as the development harness, prepare the selected official Xperience-10M episodes for the held-out Qwen3-Omni pilot, then branch into Cosmos 3 world modeling and policy-model experiments after the data preparation path is stable.

phases.name: Public-Sample Task Lab
phases.entry_condition: One public Xperience-10M sample episode is available.
phases.reader_takeaway: The public sample supports task design, feature contracts, walkthroughs, and baseline comparisons.

phases.name: Multi-Episode Data Staging
phases.entry_condition: Gated dataset availability and enough storage for selected episodes.
phases.reader_takeaway: The next scale decision is data staging, with train/test separation at the episode level.

phases.name: Qwen3-Omni LoRA Pilot
phases.entry_condition: Selected episodes are staged locally with no train/test episode leakage.
phases.reader_takeaway: The first omni-model pilot should establish a complete held-out-episode training and evaluation loop.

phases.name: Foundation-Model Selection Matrix
phases.entry_condition: The selected episodes are prepared or a 3-8 episode dry run is available for preprocessing checks.
phases.reader_takeaway: Qwen3-Omni remains the first trainable held-out pilot; Cosmos 3 is the first world-model branch; VLA/policy models wait for explicit action targets.

phases.name: 64-128 Episode Robustness Run
phases.entry_condition: The selected-episode pilot trains and evaluates cleanly.
phases.reader_takeaway: The robustness run tests whether the pilot conclusions survive broader sessions and missing modalities.

phases.name: Cosmos 3 and Policy-Model Extensions
phases.entry_condition: Enough multi-episode data, compute budget, and model-specific action/world-state targets.
deliverables: Cosmos 3 future-window or action-conditioned world-model probe
phases.reader_takeaway: The long-term direction is richer multimodal representation learning for embodied-AI reasoning, with model branches chosen by task fit rather than by a single default backbone.
